inventory.itemsBelowMin: Ibicuruzwa biri munsi ya stock nkeya

inventory.adjustmentHint: Andika umubare mwiza kugira ngo wongere, cyangwa mubi kugira ngo wongere
inventory.noWarehouses: Nta bubiko bwabonetse. Kora ububiko bwawe bwa mbere.

sales.salesHistoryDesc: Reba kandi ucunge ibyakozwe mu igurisha ryose
sales.refundDesc: Subiza ibicuruzwa byakuwe muri iri gurisha. Siga umubare ari ubusa niba ushaka gusubiza byose.
sales.fullRefundOnlyNote: Inyandiko: Gusubiza amafaranga yose nibyo byemewe gusa. Ibintu byose bizasubizwa muri stock.
sales.deleteConfirm: Uremeza ko ushaka gusiba iri gurisha? Ibi ntibishobora gusubirwamo.
sales.invoiceGenerationError: Gukora ifakitire ntibyagenze neza. Ongera ugerageze.
sales.printWindowError: Gufungura idirishya ryo gucapa ntibyagenze neza. Reba niba popup zidakimwa.

customers.softDeleteNote: Inyandiko: Ibi bizahagarika umukiriya. Amateka y'igurisha n'amakuru yabo bizagumaho kubera ihuriro ryamateka.
customers.noCustomersFound: Nta bakiriya babonetse. Ongeraho umukiriya wawe wa mbere utangire.

branches.title: Gucunga Amashami
branches.name: Izina ry'Ishami
branches.noBranches: Nta mashami yabonetse. Ongeraho ishami ryawe rya mbere.
branches.confirmDelete: Uremeza ko ushaka gusiba iri shami?

messages.contactSupportEmail: Twandikire kuri email kugira ngo uhindure email yawe.
messages.lowStockLoadError: Kureba ibicuruzwa bike ntibyagenze neza. Ongera ugerageze nyuma.
messages.expiredLoadError: Kureba ibicuruzwa byataye igihe ntibyagenze neza. Ongera ugerageze nyuma.
messages.expiringLoadError: Kureba ibicuruzwa bizata igihe vuba ntibyagenze neza. Ongera ugerageze nyuma.

pos.paymentDebtSuccess: Ukwishura kw'amafaranga {{paid}} RWF kwabonetse. {{debt}} RWF yanditswe nk'ideni.
pos.paymentError: Ukwishura ntabwo kwagenze neza. Ongera ugerageze.
pos.loadError: Kureba amakuru ntibyagenze neza. Ongera ugerageze.

companySettings.title: Igenamiterere rya Sosiyete
companySettings.description: Gucunga amakuru n'imyitwarire ya sosiyete yawe
companySettings.fetchError: Gushaka igenamiterere rya sosiyete ntibyagenze neza
companySettings.fileSizeError: Ifoto igomba kuba iri munsi ya 5MB

purchaseOrders.title: Ibisabwa byo Kugura
purchaseOrders.updateError: Kuvugurura uko icyasabwe kimeze ntibyagenze neza
purchaseOrders.searchPlaceholder: Shaka raporo ukoresheje nimero, izina ry'umucuruzi, cyangwa ibicuruzwa...
purchaseOrders.createDescription: Uzuza amakuru akurikira kugira ngo ukore ubugure bushya
purchaseOrders.noItemsAddedDesc: Tangira wongeramo ibicuruzwa mu bugure bwawe
purchaseOrders.noOrdersFoundDesc: Nturakora ubugure na bumwe. Tangira ukora ubugure bwawe bwa mbere kugira ngo wongere ibicuruzwa mu bubiko.

userManagement.title: Gucunga Abakoresha
userManagement.inviteUserDesc: Tumira ukoresha kwinjira mu muryango wawe. Tanga imeri n'inshingano.
userManagement.adminNote: Nk'umuyobozi, ushobora guha inshingano zose harimo n'iya admin.
userManagement.onlyAdminsNote: Icyitonderwa: Abayobozi gusa bashobora guha abandi inshingano ya admin.
userManagement.invitationSent: Ubutumire bwoherejwe neza! Ukoresha azakira imeri yo kwemera ubutumire.
userManagement.noPermission: Ntufite uburenganzira bwo guha inshingano ya admin.
userManagement.failedToUpdate: Kuvugurura uko ukoresha ameze ntibyagenze neza

roles.accountantDesc: Amakuru y'igurisha, gucunga imyenda, guhuza na QuickBooks

inventoryReport.errorLoading: Hagaragaye ikibazo mu gushaka amakuru y'ibarura

billing.title: Gucunga Ifatabuguzi
billing.noHistoryDesc: Amateka yawe yo kwishyura azagaragara hano umaze kwishyura.
billing.fetchError: Hagaragaye ikibazo mu gushaka ifatabuguzi. Ongera ugerageze nyuma.
billing.reactivateError: Hagaragaye ikibazo mu kongera gucana ifatabuguzi.
billing.historyError: Hagaragaye ikibazo mu gushaka amateka yo kwishyura. Ongera ugerageze nyuma.
billing.invoiceError: Hagaragaye ikibazo mu gukora inyemezabwishyu. Ongera ugerageze.
billing.choosePlanBelow: Nta fatabuguzi ufite rikoreshwa ubu. Hitamo rimwe mu rukurikirane ruri hasi kugira ngo utangire.
billing.confirmCancelDesc: Waba uzi neza ko ushaka guhagarika ifatabuguzi ryawe?
billing.premiumAccessWarningDesc: Uzahagarikirwa ibikoreshwa by'isumbuye (Gukurikirana imigurishirize, Raporo, Ibibarurwa) mu mpera z'igihe cyo kwishyura ubu rimo.
billing.undoneWarning: Ibi ntibishobora guhindurwa ubu nuhitamo kubihindura nyuma. Uzakenera kongera kuryatsa cyangwa kongera kwiyandikisha.
billing.description: Cunga amakuru yawe y'ifatabuguzi no kwishyura
billing.paymentInstructions: Kurikira amabwiriza kuri telefoni yawe kugira ngo ugeze kwishyura
billing.subscriptionExpiredMessage: Ifatabuguzi ryawe ryarangiye. Ongera kwiyandikisha nonaha kugira ngo uhabwe uburenganzira bwose.
billing.noActiveSubscriptionMessage: Kwiyandikisha nonaha kugira ngo uhabwe uburenganzira bwose no gukomeza gukoresha sisitemu.
billing.subscriptionExpiringSoonMessage: Ifatabuguzi ryawe rizata igihe mu minsi {{count}}. Ongera kwiyandikisha nonaha kugira ngo utazindirwe.
billing.trialMessage: Ubu uri gukoresha igihe cy'igeragezwa ry'ubuntu. Bizarangira ku wa {{date}}. Gura abonema ubu kugira ngo ukomeze kubona amakuru yawe n'ibindi byose.

import.failedToPreview: Gukora ibisobanuro bya mbere ntibyagenze neza
